architecture.storage: SQLite for local development, Firestore as hosted cloud persistence

rationale.summary: Short bias driven by structure, regime alignment, ATR framing, and ticker-specific calibration.
rationale.target_reason: Targets combine ATR, support-resistance structure, and per-ticker model error correction.
